feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Unrestricted stock in storage locations for maintenance orders using fiori apps
entry.content:
Hello Experts!

We are implementing the corrective maintenance process (BH1) in S/4HANA Cloud, Private Edition, and are aiming to manage everything through Fiori apps. During testing, we encountered an issue: when a maintenance order consumes a material that is out of stock in any storage location, the system allows the process to proceed without showing any error or message in the Fiori app (Create/Change Maintenance Order).

For example, when performing the same process in the SAP GUI transaction (IW31/IW32), the system displays the unrestricted-use stock as a field in the storage location search help, as shown below:

However, when we open the storage location search help in the Fiori app, the stock information is not available:

We would like to know if there is a similar functionality that allows us to view unrestricted-use stock in specific storage locations, similar to the SAP GUI, or if there is an option to activate a warning message. Alternatively, is it possible to extend the search help functionality in the Fiori app to add the stock fields using ABAP code ?

 

Thank you in advance for your help and best regards!

entry.title: MD01N lot sıze problem
entry.content:
Hello,

When we run MRP through MD01N in SAP S/4HANA, it does not always create the correct plan based on the lot size data in the MM module. Upon reviewing the MRP results, we notice that it treats weekends and public holidays as working days and generates planned orders accordingly. For example, for a material with a lot size of 3 days, when MRP runs on a Friday, we expect it to gather the needs for Friday, Saturday, and Monday and create a planned order. However, currently, it collects the needs for Friday, Saturday, and Sunday, leading to a planned order quantity based on 2 working days since Sunday is not a working day. As the frequency of the lot size decreases, it creates multiple planned orders for the same material on the same day. Is there a solution to this issue? Can you provide support? Thank you.

entry.title: The Header Material item category is not changing to T (Text) after BOM explode
entry.content: While Exploding WBS Bom, the Header material item category not getting chnaged to T (T) after having the same BOM material below.

entry.title: Fetch SAP HANA DB table data in ABAP using SQL Scripts
entry.content:
Hi All,

I want to fetch data from HANA DB by calling SQL script from an ABAP program and send the result to the concerned person via email.

 

SELECT * FROM "SYS" . "USERS" WHERE USER_DEACTIVATED='FALSE'

 

This will be an automated process (Background job)

Please help with the code.

Thanks & Regards,
Nitin

#HANA DB, SQL

entry.title: Identify table and field for rejection comment in lean service entry sheet process
entry.content:
Hi Team

For lean service entry sheet approval process users receive notification in the app inbox with two option

accept or reject

Upon rejection pop up appears for user to provide comments and the status to provide comments and the status of the lean service entry sheet updated to rejected with the comment entered at the time of rejection.

Please help identify table and field where the rejection comment stored so we can fetch information for reporting


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Contract with completion rule does not allow more than one release sales order
entry.content:
Hello SD Masters,

I faced I scenario by which customer needs to have a balance control between volume contract and referenced sales orders.

In resume:

Contract was created with 12 tons. Customer asked us to make possible to have the split of these quantity in 3 sales orders of 4 tons.

The item category of contract is assigned completion rule = "C- Item is completed after the target qty is fully referenced".

Copy control is settled with "+", in field Pos./Neg. Quan.

After creation of 1st. sales order with 4 tons. there is a message error at the momento of creation of 2nd. sales order:

"The reference has already been completely copied or rejected

Message no. V2015

Diagnosis

The reference document cannot be further referenced because all items have either been referenced or rejected"

I had an idea that the system would have a balance control, between contract and sales order. That is, this message would be shown only after I consumed the 12 tons. from the contract.

Is this a standard behavior from S/4, or something can be wrong, for here?

Best regards, and thanks!!!

entry.title: SAP MDG: Steps to Configure Document Types ?
entry.content:
Hi all,

I am trying to add the documents in the UIBB  ERP Documents while creating a business partner. I have two issues here.

One is that I can see only two document types if I try to add a document.
Second one is even if I select anyone out of it, it goes into the dump.

Can someone please help me out with the detailed process of configuring document types, add documents and make them flow to SAP.

Thanks, 
Suggu Sandeep.

entry.title: Stop Production Order Release if PRT Missing
entry.content:
We would like to stop releasing Production Order if PRT details are missing. How can I do it?

Is there any standard configuration available in SAP S/4 Hana 1709?

entry.title: Retrieve remaining quantity of product
entry.content:
I would like to retrieve remaining quantity of product from s4hana system using odata services.

Is there any API that we can use to get remaining quantity?

Best Regards,

Khaing Zin

entry.title: Same product with mixed batch to be stored in Addition to Existing stock/Next Empty Bin
entry.content:
While Doing the Configuration for Putaway rule "2" with Mixed storage on product Level is not Working .

Where on the Basis of Capacity check the Stock first should be Placed in the bin where Storage is available as per capacity else will be stored in Next empty Bin.
While Following the Configuration suggested in the SAP Note 2409948 Mixed storage of different batches in same bin not working, Getting the Error Mixed storage in HU only with mixed storage in bin (Message No. /SCWM/LT275).

entry.title: Change the value in header level based on item level supplier value in outgoing payments tile
entry.content:
I want to change / substitute the the header level reference field based on the supplier account which is in item level. FIN_CODING_BLOCK_SUBSTITUTION is for item level substitution only. Then how it is possible to change the header value based on item level field value ?.. .pls give me a solution.

 

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Finance

entry.title: Include Workflow tasks in authorization role on productive system
entry.content:
Hello,

we built a new authorization role on the S/4 development system including several workflow tasks.
After transport of the role into our test system, the workflow components were not included in the role anymore and had to be added manually in PFCG.

This is okay for the test system. But our authorizations are strictly limited on the productive system and no one is allowed to change roles on the productive system directly.

How can we achive a transport of the role including the workflow tasks, or is there any other solution to add these to the role?

Thanks,

Julia

entry.title: How to restrict both PO line items and additional G/L account amounts in MIRO?
entry.content:
Hi Team,

During invoicing with MIRO or app Create Supplier Invoice, if user selected PO line items and additional amount in GL system allowed to post entries. How we can restrict it?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Oracle 19c Database to S4 Table data migration using SAP DATA SERVICES
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

I am currently working on a migration project from an Oracle database to an S/4 HANA application system running on AWS. We have successfully set up datastore connections in SAP BODS for both the Oracle DB (datastore name: POFSN) and the S/4 HANA system (datastore name: SW1). Below is a brief overview of the connections:

S/4 HANA SYSTEM (SW1):

ORACLE Database (POFSN)

 

The issue arises when I attempt to drag a table (e.g., ADRC) from the SW1 datastore into the Dataflow in SAP BODS. I am not being given the option to set ADRC as the target table.

Is this process incorrect? What should I check to resolve this issue and ensure that tables from the S/4 HANA system can be used as target tables? 

Additionally, I would appreciate suggestions on other approaches to overwrite tables in S/4 HANA using SAP BODS.

Please let me know if any further information is required.

Thank you!

TAGS
SAP Data Services 
SAP S/4HANA 
Oracle Database

entry.title: Two processing rules would match a bank statement item, what happens then?
entry.content:
Question was raised by a colleague, what would happen if I have two rules in my system, processing rule with id 872 and two conditions, like company code and house bank account. 

And another one with id 873 with two conditions, like company code and external transaction.

Now we import a bank statement, and it contains an item which would fulfills both rule conditions. 

What happens now with the bank statement item?

entry.title: Validation on GO Button in List Report
entry.content:
I have created the List Report by using CDS consumption view(ODATA). When I press GO button with STANDARD variant giving errors why because back end has huge data(approx 12 Lakhs) and trying to load all and giving errors.

Requirement: 1. when i press GO button i want to load few data for STANDARD default variant. OR

                       2. Is there a way we can display error messages upon clicking the GO button for fiori apps (List Report) created using managed query (CDS views)

Please let me know any hook methods for GO button validation and how to restrict the data to load only few records and display OR Is there a way we can display error messages upon clicking the GO button pass message like "No items found. Check the search and filter settings." for STANDARD variant  

Thanks

entry.title: PRT availabilty check planned orders
entry.content:
Hey Gurus,

a customer I am currently working with raised the requirement that he wants to be able to check PRT availabilty for planned orders. As far as i know this availabily check is only possible for production orders right? Is there any way to check the PRT availability for planned orders? Their PRTs are maintained in the system as far as i know with a material master.

 

Thank you

entry.title: Transfer of discontinuation data from S/4HANA to ePP/DS
entry.content:
Hello,

does someone know if there is a possibility on S/4Hana 2023 to transfer the discontinuation data from MRP 4 to the embedded PP/DS, that the product interchangeability group is getting created automatically? This has been working with the CIF and APO in the past, can't imagine that this is not possible anymore.

Thanks for your feedback

Andreas

entry.title: How to post parked invoices via BAPI process?
entry.content:
Do we have BAPI For posting Parked Invoice documents (T Code MIRO)?

We need BAPI to Post Parked Invoices & while posting it should allow to Edit field from Invoice


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: how to open a connection from S4/HANA to other database
entry.content:
how to open a connection from S4/HANA to oracle.

we are in the process to setup s4/HANA and we need to be able:

  1.  to connect from s4/HANA to another database (oracle on premise)
  2. We need to connect from on premise oracle database to s4/HANA
